Variables.Name: FilterClass
Variables.Description: "None" will result in default filter being used

Variables.Name: bFinishOnOverlap
Variables.Description: if set to true (default) will make action succeed when the pawn's collision component overlaps with goal's collision component

Variables.Name: bUsePathfinding
Variables.Description: if set, movement will use path finding

Variables.Name: bAllowPartialPath
Variables.Description: if set, use incomplete path when goal can't be reached

Variables.Name: bProjectGoalToNavigation
Variables.Description: if set, GoalLocation will be projected on navigation before using

Variables.Name: bUpdatePathToGoal
Variables.Description: if set, path to GoalActor will be updated with goal's movement

Variables.Name: bAbortChildActionOnPathChange
Variables.Description: if set, other actions with the same priority will be aborted when path is changed
